topStories.title: NSE Indices launch 11 new sectoral indices including Nifty Power and Nifty Hospitals
topStories.summary: NSE Indices has introduced 11 new sectoral benchmarks, taking its total sectoral index count to 34. The move aims to deepen sector-specific market coverage, support the growing passive investment ecosystem and provide fund managers with new benchmarks for ETFs, index funds and thematic products.

topStories.title: US stocks: Aerospace parts maker Doncasters targets $4.4 billion valuation in US IPO
topStories.summary: Aerospace innovator Doncasters is gearing up for a high-stakes debut in the U.S. public market, targeting an impressive $746.7 million by offering shares priced between $28 and $32. This strategic initiative comes on the heels of a thriving U.S. IPO scene that has been flourishing since April.

topStories.title: US stocks: Fox strikes $22 billion deal for Roku to fuel streaming push
topStories.summary: Fox Corporation has announced plans to acquire Roku for approximately $22 billion, a strategic partnership designed to integrate Fox's renowned sports and news programming with Roku's top-tier streaming technology. This move is poised to significantly expand Fox's online engagement and advertising reach.

topStories.title: Rupee hits five-week high, ends at 94.71 vs USD on easing Mideast tensions
topStories.summary: The rupee rose 40 paise to close at 94.71 against the US dollar, hitting a five-week high as easing geopolitical tensions in West Asia boosted market sentiment. Falling global oil prices and expectations of stronger foreign inflows supported the currency, which traders say may extend gains amid improved risk appetite.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Benjamin Graham: "It is important to make sure that one is not lured by rash enthusiasm into commitments at levels greatly above those soundly warranted by the financial set-up and the earnings record"
topStories.summary: Benjamin Graham’s quote cautions investors against overpaying for stocks during periods of market enthusiasm. The piece explains how strong financials and earnings records should guide investment decisions, highlighting risks of overvaluation and behavioural biases. It reinforces the importance of discipline, fundamentals and long-term thinking in investing.

topStories.title: Vodafone Idea among 4 midcap stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 16% in a month
topStories.summary: Amid a strong market rally that lifted the Sensex by 736 points, four BSE MidCap stocks—Vodafone Idea, Bank of Maharashtra, Federal Bank and Nippon Life India AMC—scaled fresh 52-week highs. The milestone reflects strong investor confidence and sustained momentum in these counters.

business.title: US stocks: Aerospace parts maker Doncasters targets $4.4 billion valuation in US IPO
business.summary: Aerospace innovator Doncasters is gearing up for a high-stakes debut in the U.S. public market, targeting an impressive $746.7 million by offering shares priced between $28 and $32. This strategic initiative comes on the heels of a thriving U.S. IPO scene that has been flourishing since April.

business.title: Pick your incentive, move out of city limits: Gujarat’s new industry policy bets on flexibility to attract investors
business.summary: Officials said the objective is to make incentives more responsive to the needs of different sectors and investment categories while improving ease of doing business.

business.title: US stocks: Fox strikes $22 billion deal for Roku to fuel streaming push
business.summary: Fox Corporation has announced plans to acquire Roku for approximately $22 billion, a strategic partnership designed to integrate Fox's renowned sports and news programming with Roku's top-tier streaming technology. This move is poised to significantly expand Fox's online engagement and advertising reach.

business.title: From village hearths to global menus: How Kaladi cheese is getting a scientific makeover

business.title: Rupee hits five-week high, ends at 94.71 vs USD on easing Mideast tensions
business.summary: The rupee rose 40 paise to close at 94.71 against the US dollar, hitting a five-week high as easing geopolitical tensions in West Asia boosted market sentiment. Falling global oil prices and expectations of stronger foreign inflows supported the currency, which traders say may extend gains amid improved risk appetite.

business.title: Quote of the day by Benjamin Graham: "It is important to make sure that one is not lured by rash enthusiasm into commitments at levels greatly above those soundly warranted by the financial set-up and the earnings record"
business.summary: Benjamin Graham’s quote cautions investors against overpaying for stocks during periods of market enthusiasm. The piece explains how strong financials and earnings records should guide investment decisions, highlighting risks of overvaluation and behavioural biases. It reinforces the importance of discipline, fundamentals and long-term thinking in investing.

business.title: Vodafone Idea among 4 midcap stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 16% in a month
business.summary: Amid a strong market rally that lifted the Sensex by 736 points, four BSE MidCap stocks—Vodafone Idea, Bank of Maharashtra, Federal Bank and Nippon Life India AMC—scaled fresh 52-week highs. The milestone reflects strong investor confidence and sustained momentum in these counters.

business.title: IndiQube leases 1.5 sqft office in Chennai, rental outgo estimated at ₹235 crore

business.title: Dow Jones| Nasdaq | US Stock Market Today | Live: US futures advance as Middle East tensions ease; oil drops
Embassy Developments awards Rs 850cr construction contract to Leighton Asia
business.summary: In a landmark deal, Embassy Developments has entrusted Leighton Asia with a contract worth over Rs 850 crore for the construction of Embassy Citadel in the bustling area of Worli, Mumbai. This residential endeavor boasts a massive 1.6 million square feet of developable space, underscoring Embassy Developments' role as a major player in India's vibrant real estate landscape.

business.title: Madhusudan Kela buys luxury flat for Rs 121 cr in DLF's Gurugram project
business.summary: Ace investor Madhusudan Murlidhar Kela has purchased a luxurious flat for Rs 121 crore in DLF's new project, 'The Dahlias', in Gurugram. The agreement was registered on April 15, 2026. DLF's project, launched in October 2024, has already seen significant sales, with around 60 percent of apartments sold. The project has a substantial revenue potential.

business.title: Oil slide sends India's benchmark yield to two-month low
business.summary: Indian government bonds saw a significant rally on Monday. The benchmark yield reached a two-month low. This surge followed news of a preliminary peace deal between the U.S. and Iran. Oil prices dropped sharply, benefiting India's finances. Foreign investors are showing renewed interest in Indian bonds. This positive sentiment is expected to continue.

business.title: Monarch Networth says Nifty can hit 28,000 in 2026, picks three top stocks

The brokerage favours banking, telecom and IT sectors, while seeing opportunities in select midcap and smallcap stocks including SBI, HFCL and Hindustan Copper.

business.title: Nifty eyeing 24,600 retest;  Rajesh Bhosale says 2 stocks could outperform right now
business.summary: Indian markets are surging out of a month-long lull, with Nifty poised to reclaim April highs. Rajesh Bhosale of Angel One sees strong positive momentum, advising investors to buy on dips. He highlights Trent and Phoenix Mills as top picks, both showing significant breakout patterns. The market's upward trend appears robust, supported by positive global cues.

business.title: Rupee hits five-week high after oil plunges; traders eye further rally
business.summary: The Indian rupee strengthened against the U.S. dollar for a second day. This rise follows a drop in oil prices and measures by the Reserve Bank of India to attract foreign currency. The rupee reached its highest level in five weeks. Traders anticipate a supportive near-term phase for the currency. Lower oil prices and expected dollar inflows are key factors.
